_comment: Copy this file to settings.json and customize. Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values.

hooks._comment_hooks: Hooks are DETERMINISTIC — they always fire regardless of what the assistant decides. Use hooks for actions that MUST happen every time. Replace placeholders before enabling.

PreToolUse._comment: Example: gate any irreversible/money action. Exit code 2 blocks the tool call and sends feedback to the assistant.

hooks._comment: Print skill bank summary + session number at the start of each session.
hooks.command:
python -c "import sys,json,math,os; path=os.path.join(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','.'), 'sdar/skill_bank.json'); f=open(path) if os.path.exists(path) else None; d=json.load(f) if f else {'total_sessions':0,'skills':{}}; f.close() if f else None; N=d['total_sessions']; skills=d.get('skills',{}); [s.update({'ucb_score':round(s['avg_reward']+0.5*math.sqrt(math.log(N+1)/(s['uses']+1)),3)}) for s in skills.values()]; top=sorted(skills.items(),key=lambda x:x[1]['ucb_score'],reverse=True)[:5]; print('
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'); print(f'Eric  ·  Session #{N+1}  ·  Ready'); print('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'); print('Top skills: ' + '  |  '.join(f[0]+' '+str(f[1]['ucb_score']) for f in top) if top else 'No skills logged yet — run /learn after your first session'); print('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
')" 2>/dev/null || echo '
Eric ready.
'

hooks._comment: Inject recent session digest for continuity. Create sdar/recent-sessions.md to enable.

Stop._comment: Optional: send a notification when Claude Code finishes a long-running task. Replace webhook URL with your own (Discord, Slack, etc.).

hooks.command: curl -s -X POST "<YOUR_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE>" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"content":"Eric finished a task."}' 2>/dev/null || true

mcpServers._comment: Add MCP servers here. Keep under 10 active per session — each tool definition consumes context window. Prefer CLI equivalents (gh, aws) when context is tight.

_example_filesystem._note: Remove the leading underscore from the key name to enable this server.
